title: DocuLink WebView2 Message Protocol v1
description: Defines all messages exchanged between the C# host and the web apps over the WebView2 postMessage channel.

ViewerReadyMessage.description: Sent once by the document-viewer web app after JavaScript has initialised. The host responds by posting a PdfsLoadedMessage.

ViewerShellReadyMessage.description: Sent once by the document-viewer web app after its lightweight startup shell has mounted. The host may use this for diagnostics, but waits for ViewerContentReadyMessage before revealing the WebView.

ViewerContentReadyMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer web app after it has handled the initial PDF list and mounted the first visible content state. The host reveals the WebView after this message so startup transitions once from native placeholder to ready viewer.

PdfPayload.description: A single PDF document embedded in the workbook.

id.description: GUID that uniquely identifies this PDF within the workbook.

pageRotations.description: Optional map of 0-based page index to clockwise rotation in degrees (0, 90, 180, 270). Omitted entries default to 0.

PdfsLoadedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host to push the current workbook's PDF list to the viewer. Re-sent after any add/remove operation.

PdfUpdatedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when a single PDF's bytes change (e.g. after OCR). The viewer should update its entry list and reload the document if it is currently displayed.

PdfAddedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when a single new PDF is added to the workbook. The viewer should add the entry without reloading existing PDFs.

PdfNameUpdatedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when a PDF is renamed. The viewer should update the display name without reloading any PDF bytes.

PdfRemovedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when a PDF is deleted from the workbook. The viewer should remove the entry and revoke its blob URL.

ManagerReadyMessage.description: Sent once by the file-manager web app after JavaScript has initialised. The host responds by posting a FilesLoadedMessage.

FolderPayload.description: A named folder used to organise PDF documents.

id.description: GUID that uniquely identifies this folder.

FileMetadataPayload.description: Metadata for a single PDF in the file manager. Does NOT include base64 bytes.

id.description: GUID matching the storage Pdf id.

folderId.description: GUID of the owning folder, or omitted if uncategorised.

status.description: PDF content classification: ocr (processed), text (native text layer), none (scanned).

dateAdded.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the file was added.

FilesLoadedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host to push the current workbook's file list to the file manager. Re-sent after any mutation.

AddFilePayload.description: A single file to be added, as sent from the web UI.

AddFilesMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user drops or picks files.

BrowsePdfFilesMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user asks to browse for PDFs. The C# host owns the native file picker and imports selected file paths.

RenameFileMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user renames a file.

RemoveFileMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user removes a file.

MoveFileMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user moves a file to a different folder. Send folderId as null/omitted to move to uncategorised.

AddFolderMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user creates a new folder.

RenameFolderMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user renames a folder.

RemoveFolderMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user deletes a folder. Files in the folder become uncategorised.

SetSelectedFolderMessage.description: Sent when the user changes the active folder in the file manager. Used by the host when importing files from OS drag/drop (Explorer) so new PDFs match the current selection. Omit folderId when 'All Files' is selected.

folderId.description: GUID of the selected folder, absent for uncategorised / All Files.

RectPayload.description: A normalized rectangle (0–1 coordinate space, top-left origin) on a single PDF page.

LinkRectangleCreatedMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer when the user finishes drawing a link rectangle. Contains the PDF region and the extracted, formatted text ready for cell insertion.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF the rectangle was drawn on.

text.description: Extracted and formatted text contained within the rectangle.

linkType.description: How the extracted text is processed before writing to the Excel cell. Defaults to 'auto' if omitted.

appendToActiveSum.description: When true for a Sum link, append this rectangle's numbers to the currently active Sum-linked cell instead of creating a new link cell. Sent when the user holds Ctrl while completing the rectangle.

LinkRectangleUpdatedMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer when the user finishes moving or resizing an existing link rectangle. Contains the updated PDF region and re-extracted text to replace the linked cell contents.

id.description: GUID of the LinkedRectangle being updated.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF the rectangle belongs to.

text.description: Re-extracted text contained within the updated rectangle.

CacheBuildStartedMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer immediately before building the per-page text-content cache for the loaded PDF. The host should show a loading indicator.

CacheBuildCompleteMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer once the text-content cache has been fully built. The host should hide the loading indicator.

LinkedRectanglePayload.description: A single persisted link rectangle, as sent from the C# host to the viewer.

id.description: GUID that uniquely identifies this linked rectangle.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF this rectangle belongs to.

linkType.description: How the linked text is processed before writing to the Excel cell. Defaults to 'auto' if omitted.

LinkedRectanglesLoadedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host to push the full set of persisted link rectangles to the viewer. Re-sent after any add operation so the viewer stays in sync.

LinkRectangleClickedMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer when the user clicks a persisted link rectangle overlay. The host responds by activating the linked worksheet and selecting the linked cell.

id.description: GUID of the LinkedRectangle that was clicked.

LinkRectangleDeletedMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer when the user deletes a persisted link rectangle (e.g. via context menu). The host removes the link from storage, clears the linked cell background, and notifies the viewer to remove the overlay.

id.description: GUID of the LinkedRectangle to delete.

LinkRectanglesRemovedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host after one or more link rectangles are deleted. The viewer should remove the matching overlay divs from the DOM (if present on the active PDF) without reloading all rectangles.

ids.description: GUIDs of the LinkedRectangles that were removed.

NavigateToRectangleMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when the user selects a linked cell in Excel. The viewer should switch to the specified PDF (if needed), jump instantly to the page, and highlight the rectangle.

id.description: GUID of the LinkedRectangle to highlight.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF containing the rectangle.

ClearRectangleHighlightMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when the user selects a cell that is not linked to any rectangle. The viewer should remove any active rectangle highlight.

HighlightRectangleMessage.description: Sent by the C# host to highlight a specific link rectangle in the viewer without changing zoom, scroll, or page. Used after a new rectangle is created so the overlay is visually selected.

id.description: GUID of the LinkedRectangle to highlight.

ResetUiMessage.description: Sent by the C# host when the file-manager window is hidden. The web app should reset transient UI state so the next show starts fresh.

CancelOcrMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user clicks 'Cancel OCR'. The host kills the worker process and reverts all queued/in-flight jobs to their original status (none or text).

OcrPdfsMessage.description: Sent by the file-manager web app when the user clicks 'OCR'. The host runs full OCR on scanned PDFs and geometry-only extraction on PDFs with an embedded text layer, replying with one or more OcrStatusMessages.

pdfIds.description: GUIDs of the PDFs to process.

RotatePageMessage.description: Sent by the document-viewer when the user clicks a rotate button. The host rotates the stored page rotation, transforms any link rectangles on that page, and responds with a PageRotationsUpdatedMessage followed by a LinkedRectanglesLoadedMessage.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF containing the page to rotate.

direction.description: Rotation direction: cw = 90° clockwise, ccw = 90° counter-clockwise.

PageRotationsUpdatedMessage.description: Sent by the C# host after a page is rotated. The viewer should update its rotation state and re-render the affected page.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF whose rotations changed.

rotations.description: Map of 0-based page index to new clockwise rotation in degrees.

OcrStatusMessage.description: Sent by the C# host to the file-manager to report per-PDF OCR/Enhance progress. Transient values queued/processing/error are used during jobs; persisted status becomes ocr on success.

pdfId.description: GUID of the PDF being processed.

status.description: Job lifecycle state. ocr is sent when OCR or Enhance completes successfully.

message.description: Optional human-readable detail, typically populated on error.

MatcherAppReadyMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app once mounted. The host responds with MatcherReadyMessage.

MatcherKeyColumnPayload.description: A selected Excel key column range used for document matching.

MatcherOutputColumnPayload.description: An Excel output column available to receive created links.

MatcherReadyMessage.description: Sent by C# host in response to matcher-app-ready. Contains Excel selection metadata and available folders.

MatcherSelectionLockedMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app when the user leaves Step 1. The host freezes the current Excel selection for matching.

MatcherSelectionUnlockedMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app when the user returns to Step 1. The host resumes live Excel selection updates.

MatcherLogMessage.description: Diagnostic message sent by the document-matcher web app for host-side logging.

MatcherGeometryPreparedMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app after preparing transient text geometry from a text-layer PDF. The host caches this geometry in memory for the workbook session only.

geometryBase64.description: Gzip-compressed text-geometry-v1 JSON, base64-encoded. Not persisted to workbook storage.

MatcherSelectionChangedMessage.description: Sent by C# host when the Excel selection changes while the matcher wizard is open.

StartMatchingMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app when the user clicks Start. The host responds with MatcherDataLoadedMessage.

folderIds.description: Folder ids to search. The reserved value __all__, or an empty array, means search every PDF in the workbook.

MatcherDataLoadedMessage.description: Sent by C# host with key column values per data row and PDF geometry for matching.

geometryBase64.description: Stored OCR/Enhance geometry or transient session-cached geometry.

base64.description: PDF bytes as base64, present only when geometryBase64 is unavailable and the web matcher must prepare transient text-layer geometry.

CreateLinksMessage.description: Sent by the document-matcher web app after matching is complete. C# creates the links and responds with LinksCreatedMessage.

LinksCreatedMessage.description: Sent by C# host after all link creation requests have been processed.
